title: EkaiiCreate
description: Modpack used in EkaiiCreate server, a french modded server. Based on Create with some addons, qol, optimization and world gen features.
body:
![EkaiiCreate Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52311b70f7f1665e9bf9839da8498b7764f5aa75.png)

-----------------

# Features

- Custom modpack for EkaiiCreate Server, based on Create.
- Features QOL, optimization and world generation enhancements.
- Aimed to be played on EkaiiCreate Server, but can be played standalone, with some generation features disabled.

Are you ready to join the adventure ?

# Who are we ?

Ekaii is a french vanilla server, running on a custom Paper fork. We decided to launch this side-project for our members. Our community is based on trust, that's why there is a whitelist on our vanilla server, and on our modded server. If you want to join, feel free to apply. However, the communication is mainly in French.

# Useful links

[![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/github-%23121011.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/EkaiiMC/EkaiiCreate)

***Disclaimer** : The modpack is still in development and subject to changes.*
